messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.

message.content: This section functions as a title heading that can answer questions regarding the report's scope, specifically identifying the topic (premier Chinese-developed mobile games), target market (global markets), and reference year (2025). It does not list specific game titles, developer entities, performance metrics, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, or evidence types, indicating that such detailed information would be presented in the subsequent content under this heading.
